title: Youtube 3010 Announcement Trailer Confirmed Fake and Removed
display_title: Youtube 3010 Announcement Trailer Confirmed Fake and Removed
wikitext:
[]: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - Confirmed Fake and Removed             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Jan 25, 2016 5:52 pm https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2wrZDP0g3x4 I know we get a lot of fake outs and get our hopes up, but the channel itself looks like it could possibly be real but it only has the one video and I don't know if Khara has an official youtube channel. It's not on evangelion.co.jp, Khara's website or twitter, Evafan, or any of the usual sources yet, so huge grain of salt as usual as the odds lean to "fake." The "release date" given here is August 31st.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Announcement - The Real Deal?             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Mon Jan 25, 2016 5:54 pm Hmmm...don't believe it until I see an official source post it. Also, anyone know what the writing in the supposed announcement trailer says?

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Announcement - The Real Deal?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Jan 25, 2016 6:06 pm That's how I feel as well. It would be great if it were true but I'm very skeptical of any of these until they surface from one of the official sources. I thought I should bring it up so we can go through the usual rigmarole.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Announcement - The Real Deal?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Mon Jan 25, 2016 6:12 pm One clue may be the release date a) Is it enough time to complete the film? (especially with Resurgence still on the horizon) b) Does it coincide with any Eva relevant dates?

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Announcement - The Real Deal?             Quote Post by xPearse » Mon Jan 25, 2016 6:40 pm Hmm. Was any of that footage new? Also, CGI fest.

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Announcement - The Real Deal?             Quote Post by Ray » Mon Jan 25, 2016 6:43 pm FAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAKKKE!

[]: Re: 3.0+1.0 Announcement - The Real Deal?             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Mon Jan 25, 2016 6:59 pm xPearse wrote: Hmm. Was any of that footage new? Also, CGI fest.

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Jan 25, 2016 7:06 pm I've edited the title and the original post to better reflect the questionable nature of the video, as it's not my intention to be misleading. Trying to watch a movie, read subs, post and take notes all at once really hurts one's clarity.

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by MarioAyanami128 » Mon Jan 25, 2016 9:45 pm Pardon me, but isn't the video stating that there will be more info on August 31st, rather than the date being a reference to the film's launch? The only thing that bugs me is the version of the 9th Symphony used in the trailer. This version is different from the one seen in 3.33 as well as the one from NGE...

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Jan 25, 2016 9:58 pm Not sure, but you have a point about the music. There's also the "E" in Evangelion.co.jp at the end. I've always seen that written in lower case. And it's just the trailer footage at a slightly slower speed and different aspect ratio. We'll know if Khara doesn't post it in the next day or two!

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jan 25, 2016 10:04 pm Fake. The youtube account does not have a reputable connection with Khara - this is the only video they've posted. The official Khara & Evangelion websites have not put out any news updates. The youtube video is using 3+ year old footage that was quickly thrown together by the production team to be tossed onto the end credits of 3.0. Depending on whether or not that scene or something like it makes it into Final, it'll be 100% re-animated. The youtube video is also mimicking the "Hold the Title over the Footage" gimmick Khara has used on the Blu-Ray announcements for the three previous films. Those have all consistently used the english written Evangelion title and not the Japanese text. August 31st seems ambitious. It would basically mean Hideaki Anno - drastically against his usual style - would have been working pretty steadily on two feature length films concurrently so as both would be ready in the second half of 2016. Exactly one month apart. Seems very ambitious based on what we know about Anno. I would love to be proven wrong but everything about it screams fake to me. Nicely done. But fake.

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Jan 25, 2016 10:15 pm http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4333.html Evafan very rightly posts it as "account claiming to be khara" They also note that all the previous video announcements have been on the official sit and using the Bandai Channel player, not Youtube. Remember kids, it's not news until it's on the official site.

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by MarioAyanami128 » Mon Jan 25, 2016 10:18 pm I think that this may be fake after all. It makes no sense for them to use a track that probably won't return in the final film, as well as being different from every itteration of the theme played throughout the series. Good catch with the 'E' on the web address shown in the video!

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Jan 25, 2016 10:24 pm Hmm, looking closely at the video it should be pretty safe to call it fake just from the fact of how poorly upscaled and encoded the eva fight is vs the supremely crisp letter overlayed on top. Some jackass just used a crappy pirate rip of the movie to make this. It's also great to see a healthy dose of skepticism on Japanese twitter. EDIT: holy fuck this is a bad fake BD screencap, note how fucking crisp and clear this is, especially the red side detail which is prone to encoding fuckery. There is no reason for khara's internally produced video to be any less quality than this: http://i.imgur.com/yFh0dhk.jpg Meanwhile, the shitty video used in the fake trailer under the crystal clear text added on top by a dumbass: http://i.imgur.com/9nn7Ypm.jpg YOU SEE THIS, THIS IS WHY YOU GET THE BEST QUALITY POSSIBLE IF YOU INTEND TO FUCK WITH PEOPLE. Laziness will get you nowhere.

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by Adaminator1 » Mon Jan 25, 2016 10:56 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Snip

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon Jan 25, 2016 11:05 pm Youtube does things very evenly. You can't fuck the background in one way and not fuck the text in similarly. The source of the fight is very clearly an extremely poor one. Also update from Evafan, channel is fake: http://neweva.blog103.fc2.com/blog-entry-4333.html The video has also been deleted because actual khara told them to. Everyone back to your holes. EDIT: King Records officially stating is fake as shit: http://mantan-web.jp/2016/01/26/2016012 ... 1000c.html tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) lol, illegal (違法) trailer tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com'))

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Jan 26, 2016 12:51 am "This video is no longer available due to a copyright claim by 株式会社カラー." I'm sure if the video were actually official, then Khara wouldn't have officially taken it down. Also, what Bounty said.

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by FullMetalBiscuit » Tue Jan 26, 2016 3:15 am Well that's the end of that then...*crawls back into hole*

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - The Real Deal Or Another Fake?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Tue Jan 26, 2016 3:57 am Well, glad they were so swift about addressing that! I sent Khara a tweet yesterday asking about it, so now we know! Ah well. [Waiting intensifies].

[]: Re: Youtube 3.0+1.0 "Announcement Trailer" - Confirmed Fake and Removed             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Apr 25, 2016 5:03 pm Here's another fake trailer that's popped up on youtube in the past week. Came to my attention courtesy of the Eva subreddit: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_3RNTMChT4Q I'll give them a little credit for doing more than recycling footage from 1.0-3.0. Does anyone know where that clip of Gendo at 0:15 comes from? I don't think I've ever seen that one before.
